title: eriophorum × fulvum
intro: Eriophorum × fulvum, also known as the hybrid cotton-grass or Fulvous Cotton-grass, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of Eriophorum angustifolium and Eriophorum vaginatum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and wounds due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eriophorum × fulvum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
